  const el = document.querySelector("textarea") || document.querySelector("[placeholder*="company.com"]");
  if (!el) return {ok:false, reason:"no textarea"};
  const proto = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype, "value");
  proto.set.call(el, text);
  el.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", {bubbles:true}));
  el.dispatchEvent(new Event("change", {bubbles:true}));
  return {ok:true, len: text.length, lines: text.split("
").filter(Boolean).length, valueLen: el.value.length};
})()
